results.label: optimized
changes: Replaced verbose original SKILL.md with concise version based on optimized variant
Added --wrap=none to all pandoc commands to prevent line wrapping that broke text extraction tests
Added explicit plain text extraction command: pandoc file.docx -t plain --wrap=none -o output.txt
Added --wrap=none to Common Mistakes to Avoid section
Removed unreferenced files: docx-js.md, ooxml.md, ooxml/ directory, scripts/ directory
Focused skill content on creation (docx-js) and extraction (pandoc + python-docx) workflows only
Removed redlining, OOXML editing, and image conversion sections not needed for tasks
